project: Pinchy Slab Face sponsor CRM seed list

prospects.company_type: Global apparel and outdoor equipment brand
prospects.sponsor_signal: Listed as a 2025 Grip n Rip sponsor on 9 Degrees Brisbane events page.
prospects.geography: Global brand with Australian retail presence
prospects.fit_notes: Strong climbing credibility; good for headline prize packs, athlete-backed promotion, and co-branded editorial.
prospects.outreach_angle: Competition prizes, premium brand alignment, local event storytelling

prospects.sponsor_signal: Listed as a 2025 Grip n Rip sponsor on 9 Degrees Brisbane events page.
prospects.fit_notes: Retailer can move across gift cards, event booths, affiliate partnerships, and broader outdoor audience reach.
prospects.outreach_angle: Retail vouchers, expo tables, gear bundles

prospects.sponsor_signal: Listed as a 2025 Grip n Rip sponsor on 9 Degrees Brisbane events page.
prospects.fit_notes: Very direct product fit for comps, training prizes, and digital content partnerships.

prospects.sponsor_signal: Listed as a 2025 Grip n Rip sponsor on 9 Degrees Brisbane events page.
